# Purpose

<!-- Generated by /init — describes why this project exists -->

## Problem Statement

**isNestle** is an iOS app that lets a shopper scan a product barcode and instantly
see whether the product is made by **Nestlé S.A.** or one of its subsidiaries.

Nestlé is a large conglomerate, and some consumers choose to boycott its products
for ethical reasons. The core problem: many Nestlé subsidiaries and brands are
marketed in ways that deliberately obscure their relationship to the parent
company, making it hard for a shopper to know — at the shelf, in the moment — who
actually owns the brand in their hand. isNestle removes that ambiguity with a
single scan.

## Target Users

Anyone who wants their spending to align with their values — to direct dollars
toward companies whose practices match their beliefs, and away from those that
don't. The Nestlé boycott is the first concrete use case, but the underlying need
is general: *"is this product made by company X?"*

A motivating future scenario: a shopper could tell an Instacart shopper (or any
delivery/substitution service) "substitute freely, as long as it isn't from
company X" — where X is configurable, not hard-coded to Nestlé.

## Design Principle: Generalize Beyond Nestlé

Although the v1 product and brand name target Nestlé specifically, the app **must
be architected so the target company is data-driven, not hard-coded.** Nestlé is
the first "boycott target," but the same engine should support boycotting any
parent company by swapping or extending the underlying brand-ownership dataset.

This principle informs the data model (see `STACK.md`), the feature set (see
`FEATURES.md`), and the long-term roadmap (see `PROJECT.md`).

## Prior Art

No specific existing solution has been identified as a direct predecessor. Adjacent
tools exist (ethical-shopping and brand-boycott apps, open product databases such
as Open Food Facts), but none is being treated as a baseline to replace. This is
effectively a greenfield build. *(To revisit if a direct competitor is identified.)*
